raw: regular concord should natively support reticulum.
optimized:
### OPT-001: Add Reticulum support to Concord

Add native Reticulum network support to the main Concord project. Reticulum should be integrated as a first-class transport/discovery mechanism alongside the existing Matrix backend. Scope: regular Concord (not a fork or beta variant).

Source: "regular concord should natively support reticulum."
